spl_product_data_elements: Humco Povidone Iodine Povidone Iodine 10% ANHYDROUS CITRIC ACID GLYCERIN NONOXYNOL-9 SODIUM HYDROXIDE WATER POVIDONE-IODINE IODINE
active_ingredient: Active Ingredient Povidone-Iodine 10% (Equivalent to 1% titrable iodine)
indications_and_usage: Use First aid antiseptic to prevent infection in minor cuts and burns.
ask_doctor: Ask a doctor before use if you have deep punture wounds animal bites serious burns
stop_use: Stop use and consult a doctor if the condition persists or gets worse irritation and redness develop and persits for more than 72 hours
when_using: When using this product do not use in eyes use on individuals who are allergic or sensitive to iodine or use for longer thn 1 week unless directed by a doctor apply over large areas of the body
keep_out_of_reach_of_children: Keep out of reach of children. In case of accidental ingestion, seek professional assistance or contact a Poison Control Center immediately.
dosage_and_administration: Directions Clean the affected area. Apply a small amount on the area 1 to 3 times daily. May be covered with sterile bandage. If badaged, let it dry first.
other_safety_information: Other information store at room temperature, 20-25C (68-77F)
inactive_ingredient: Inactive Ingredients Citric Acid, Disodium Phosphate, Glycerin, nonoxynol-9. Sodium Hydroxide and Purified Water.
package_label_principal_display_panel: Principal Display Panel Label 8 fl oz Label 8 fl oz
Principal Display Panel Label 16 fl oz Humco Povidone Label 16 fl oz

spl_product_data_elements: Povi-One Povidone-Iodine 10% topical SODIUM CITRATE WATER ANHYDROUS CITRIC ACID SODIUM PHOSPHATE, DIBASIC, ANHYDROUS POLYSORBATE 80 POVIDONE-IODINE IODINE GLYCERIN Liquid
active_ingredient: Drug Facts Active Ingredients Drug Facts Active
warnings: Warnings For External Use Do Not Use Warnings for External Use
stop_use: Stop Use And Ask A Doctor Stop Use And Ask A Doctor
keep_out_of_reach_of_children: Keep out of Reach of Children Keep Out of Reach of Children
dosage_and_administration: Dosage and Administration Drug Facts Panel
package_label_principal_display_panel: Povi-One Outside Box label Povi-One Outside

spl_product_data_elements: Medi-First PVP Iodine Wipes Povidone iodine 10% CITRIC ACID MONOHYDRATE GLYCERIN WATER NONOXYNOL-9 SODIUM HYDROXIDE POVIDONE-IODINE IODINE
indications_and_usage: Uses first aid antiseptic to help prevent infection in minor cuts, scrapes and burns
warnings: Warnings For external use only. Ask a doctor before use if you have deep or puncture wounds animal bites serious burns Do not use in the eyes over large areas of the body on individuals who are allergic or sensative to iodine as a first aid atiseptic for longer than 1 week Stop use and ask a doctor if condition worsens or persists for more than 72 hours irritation and redness develops Keep out of reach of children. If swallowed, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away.
ask_doctor: Ask a doctor before use if you have deep or puncture wounds animal bites serious burns
do_not_use: Do not use in the eyes over large areas of the body on individuals who are allergic or sensative to iodine as a first aid atiseptic for longer than 1 week
stop_use: Stop use and ask a doctor if condition worsens or persists for more than 72 hours irritation and redness develops
keep_out_of_reach_of_children: Keep out of reach of children. If swallowed, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away.
dosage_and_administration: Directions clean the affected area apply1 to 3 times daily may be covered with a sterile bandage if bandaged, let dry first
other_safety_information: Other information store at controlled temperature 59-86ºF (15-30ºC)
inactive_ingredient: Inactive ingredients citric acid, glycerin, nonxynol-9, sodium hydroxide, water
package_label_principal_display_panel: Medi-First PVP Iodine Label Medi-First® PVP Iodine Wipes Product # 26712 1" x 2" Wipes Net Contents: 10 per box Medi-First

spl_product_data_elements: Povidone Iodine Topical Solution Paint Povidone Iodine 10% CITRIC ACID ACETATE GLYCERIN NONOXYNOL-9 WATER SODIUM HYDROXIDE POVIDONE-IODINE IODINE
active_ingredient: Active Ingredient Povidone-Iodine, USP 10% (1.0% available iodine)
indications_and_usage: Use prepping intact skin and mucous membranes prior to sugery
warnings: Warnings for external use only avoid use on persons allergic to iodine
stop_use: Stop using this product and ask a doctor if skin shows symptoms of irritation, sensitivity, redness, pain or swelling
keep_out_of_reach_of_children: Keep out of reach of children. if swallowed, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away
dosage_and_administration: Directions Patient preoperative prep apply solution to operative site following povidone iodine scrub application using a circular motion, start at incision site and move outward remove all soiled underdrapes do no allow solution to pool
storage_and_handling: Other information store at room temperature avoid excessive heat (above 104 degrees F/40 degrees C) protect from freezing latex free
inactive_ingredient: Inactive Ingredients Citric acid, glycerol, nonylphenol ethoxylate, Purified Water, sodium hydroxide
